phases.theme: PHASE A — Accurate Panel Layout & kWp
phases.goal: Replace the area*0.65*0.18 guess with a real geometric module-packing engine: place 2.278m x 1.134m modules inside each roof polygon honoring setbacks, row spacing (GCR), and principal-axis orientation; draw the packed panels on the map; derive precise kWp; expose an estimate-vs-packed confidence so every downstream PVGIS/finance number flows from real geometry.

improvements.title: Create src/lib/packing.ts module skeleton with PackResult type (count, kwp, rectangles, orientation, gcr, setbackM, confidence)
Add MODULE constant: 2.278m x 1.134m landscape footprint, 0.02m colGap, configurable Wp (default 550)
Install/import @turf submodules (boolean-contains, transform-rotate, bbox, buffer, convex, area, centroid) to guarantee helpers exist on turf v7
Implement principalAxisAngle(poly): convex hull then test each hull-edge bearing, rotate by -bearing, measure bbox area, keep smallest (OMBB)
Implement applySetback(poly, setbackM): turf.buffer negative inward, return null when result undefined or area < 5 m^2
Implement local-metre grid generator using lat scale 111320 and lon scale 111320*cos(latRad) around polygon centroid
Rotate inset polygon by -theta about centroid pivot before gridding (transformRotate degrees clockwise)
Step the grid by (moduleW+colGap) horizontally and (footprintDepth+rowGap) vertically across the rotated bbox
Keep a cell only when turf.booleanContains(rotInset, cell) passes; collect kept cells
Rotate each kept cell back by +theta about the same pivot to recover real-world panel rectangles
Try both portrait and landscape module orientations, keep whichever yields more modules
Compute kwp = count * Wp / 1000 and return alongside the rectangle FeatureCollection
Compute winter-solstice row pitch: alpha = 90 - lat - 23.45, rowGap = L*sin(tilt)/tan(alpha)
Compute GCR = d/(d+rowGap) and store it on PackResult for transparency
Set rowGap = 0 for pitched coplanar roofs (only setback applies, denser packing)
Default flat-roof tilt 10-15deg for row-pitch math; expose tilt as a parameter
Pass building latitude into row-pitch so Lisbon/Porto/Faro alpha differ correctly
Handle MultiPolygon roofs: pack each polygon (wing) independently, sum counts, merge rectangles
Cache computed theta on a per-building basis to avoid recomputing the OMBB each render
Add default fire/access setback constant: 1.0m for C&I flat roofs
Bump setback to 1.83m when any roof side exceeds 76m (NFPA/IFC large-roof rule)
Add ridge/parapet 0.45m-0.91m setback variants keyed on coverage fraction (under/over 33%)
Document Portugal ANEPC/DGS 0.5-1.0m edge/parapet keep-off rationale inline
Guard tiny/degenerate roofs: return count 0 cleanly when inset is null after setback
Add fast usable-fraction estimator estimateKwpFast(area, roofType) as a cheap pre-pack tier
Define USABLE fractions table: flat_tilted 0.50, flat_ew 0.65, pitched 0.75, unknown 0.50
Compute footprint per roof type: flat-tilted moduleArea/GCR (~5.2 m^2), pitched moduleArea/0.95
Rewrite areaToKwp to use roof-type usable fraction + footprint instead of fixed 0.65/2.58
Replace estimatePeakPower body to call the new usable-fraction estimate (keep signature stable)
Default unknown roof-type usable fraction to 0.50 so legacy callers stay conservative
Add an OBSTACLE_DERATE table (flat_tilted 0.90, pitched 0.95, unknown 0.88) applied to headline kWp
Keep raw packed count separate from derated headline kWp on PackResult
Do NOT fabricate panels for obstacles: apply transparent derate only, never draw fake rectangles
Optional obstacle exclusion: pull man_made=chimney, building:part, roof:material=glass from Overpass
turf.difference obstacle polygons from the inset before gridding when obstacle geometry exists
Tag confidence: 'packed' when geometry packing ran, 'estimate' when only fast tier used
Surface estimate-vs-packed delta (percent) so users see how far the heuristic was off
Memoize packing result per building id in a module-level cache keyed on geometry+params hash
Add packBuilding(building, opts) facade returning PackResult from a BuildingFeature
Add packedKwp field to Lead so the precise value persists once computed
Persist packed rectangles GeoJSON (or a compact RLE) per lead for redraw without recompute
Wire LocationDetails kWp readout to packed kWp, falling back to estimate when not yet packed
Feed packed kWp into fetchPVGIS as peakPowerKwp at LocationDetails call site (line 58)
Feed packed kWp into fetchPVGIS at LocationSummary call site (line 120)
Use packed kWp in pdfReport computeFinance call so reports reflect real layout
Use packed kWp in leadScore size sub-score instead of estimatePeakPower(area)
Use packed kWp in useFilteredBuildings kWp filter so map filtering matches reality
Use packed kWp in TableView kWp column + total kWp aggregation
Use packed kWp in SearchFilter kWp range computation
Add 'Recompute layout' action in LocationDetails that triggers packBuilding and updates the lead
Show module count, kWp, GCR and setback used in a small layout summary card
Show estimate-vs-packed confidence badge (e.g. 'packed: 412 kWp, was est 380')
Add panels-fill GeoJSON source for packed rectangles in addAppLayers
Add panels-fill layer (dark-blue #1e3a8a, opacity ~0.85) above buildings-fill
Add panels-outline line layer for crisp module edges at high zoom
Populate panels source for the selected building only; setData([]) on deselect
Gate panels-fill with minzoom ~17 so individual modules only render when zoomed in
Re-add panels source/layer inside the styledata guard so they survive setStyle
Clear panels source on selection change to avoid stale rectangles from prior building
Add a 'Show panel layout' toggle that computes+draws packing for the selected building
Run packing in a requestIdleCallback/microtask so it never blocks the click handler
Add Vitest to devDependencies and a vitest.config for src/lib unit tests
Test: flat rectangular roof packed count within ~5% of hand calculation
Test: pitched roof packs denser than equivalent flat-tilted roof (rowGap=0 vs >0)
Test ORIENTATION INVARIANCE: rotate input polygon any angle -> identical module count
Test: tiny roof returns count 0 after setback (inset null path)
Test: setback bumps to 1.83m when a side exceeds 76m
Test: rowGap formula matches winter-solstice no-shade for Lisbon latitude
Test: portrait vs landscape selection picks the higher count
Test: MultiPolygon roof sums per-wing counts correctly
Test: principalAxisAngle aligns rows with the longest wall on an L-shaped roof
Test: obstacle difference removes modules overlapping a chimney polygon
Test: areaToKwp roof-type fractions produce expected module counts
Test: estimatePeakPower delegates to usable-fraction estimate and stays non-negative
Add a fixture set of real OSM warehouse polygons for regression packing tests
Add JSDoc to every exported packing function with units (metres, degrees, Wp)
Guard against self-intersecting/kinked roof rings before packing (turf kinks check)
Simplify very large/complex roof rings (turf.simplify tolerance ~0.3m) before OMBB to bound cost
Cap grid cell count and bail to fast estimate if a pathological roof would exceed N cells
Expose module spec (W,H,Wp,colGap) via a config block so different module models can be swapped
Add per-building override for setback and tilt in LocationDetails (advanced panel)
Recompute packing when user changes setback/tilt overrides and redraw immediately
Show usable-area m^2 (inset area) vs gross roof m^2 in the layout card
Add a coverage-fraction readout (module area / gross roof area) to sanity-check packing
Store roof orientation theta on the lead for reuse by the orientation arrow (Phase E)
Add deterministic tie-break (prefer landscape) when portrait/landscape counts are equal
Round kWp consistently (1 decimal) across packing and finance to avoid display drift
Validate Wp and module dimensions at packing entry (fail fast on zero/negative)
Add a batch packing utility to compute packed kWp for all visible buildings off the main thread budget
Throttle batch packing so it never packs more than K buildings per idle frame
Show packed-vs-estimate aggregate delta in TableView footer (total packed kWp)
Replace pvgis.ts PVGISInput peakPowerKwp comment that references the 0.18 heuristic
Document the full packing pipeline (OMBB -> setback -> grid -> contains -> derate) in ARCHITECTURE.md
Add a confidence enum (high/medium/low) derived from roof regularity + packing path
Flag non-rectangular / very-large roofs for manual ortho verification in the layout card
Add unit test ensuring packed kWp flows unchanged into computeFinance capex tiers
Add a 'estimate only' fast path flag to skip packing for low-confidence/tiny roofs in bulk
Emit a structured warning (not console.log) when packing falls back to estimate
Add npm script 'test' (vitest run) and 'test:watch' for the packing suite
Verify the full chain end-to-end: pack -> draw -> PVGIS -> finance for a sample warehouse

phases.goal: Derive each roof's real orientation, tilt, azimuth and plane structure from geometry plus OSM roof tags, classify flat vs pitched, split multi-plane roofs, estimate building height from levels, and feed PVGIS the true angles per roof so energy and finance numbers reflect the actual rooftop instead of a south/30 assumption.

improvements.title: Create src/lib/roofGeometry.ts with a RoofModel type (planes, azimuth, tilt, shape, isFlat, heightM, confidence)
Project roof ring to local ENU metres before any axis math (lat/lon to metres around centroid)
Compute principal axis via min rotated rectangle on the ENU-projected ring (convex calipers)
Derive E-W axis as principalAxis+90 and N-S axis as principalAxis+0 for plane orientation
Classify flat vs pitched from building tag first (warehouse/industrial -> flat)
Treat roof as pitched only when roof:shape is gabled/hipped or building is house-like
Read roof:shape tag (flat, gabled, hipped, gambrel, skillion) and map to a RoofShape enum
Read roof:orientation tag (along/across) to disambiguate ridge direction
Read roof:direction tag and document that it is the DOWNSLOPE direction, not the ridge
Read roof:angle / roof:slope tag and use it as tilt when present
Default flat-roof azimuth to south (0) and tilt to 10-15deg for tilted-rack flat C&I
Add an east-west flat layout mode (azimuth +/-90, low tilt) as an alternative flat plane set
Segment a gabled roof into two planes perpendicular to the ridge line
Assign gabled plane azimuths as principalAxis+90 and principalAxis+270
Split each gabled plane's area as ~half the footprint (adjust for hip cut)
Default pitched tilt to ~25-30deg when no roof:angle tag is available
Estimate building height from height tag (strip units), else building:levels*3.2
Fallback height by use: warehouse/industrial ~8-10m, retail ~6m when no tags
Parse building:levels safely (numeric, >0) with NaN guards
Store estimated heightM on the RoofModel for extrusion (Phase D) and shading reuse
Add buildRoofModel(building) facade returning a RoofModel from a BuildingFeature
Query building:levels in the Overpass query so the tag is available
Query roof:shape, roof:orientation, roof:direction, roof:angle, height tags in Overpass
Preserve these roof tags through elementToBuilding into rawTags (already kept) and surface needed ones
Add inferredHeightM + roofShape fields to BuildingFeature computed at ingest
Add azimuth + tilt + isFlat fields to the persisted roof model on Lead
Pass real azimuth+tilt to fetchPVGIS at LocationDetails call site instead of default south/30
Pass real azimuth+tilt to fetchPVGIS at LocationSummary call site (line 120)
Flat warehouse path: single PVGIS call at south/tilt with optimal off (keep fast path)
Gabled path: two PVGIS calls (each plane azimuth/tilt) summed for total annual energy
Add fetchPVGISMultiPlane(planes) helper that sums per-plane yearly + merges monthly arrays
Split packed kWp across planes by plane area so each PVGIS call gets the right peakPower
Pack each roof plane in its own orientation (Phase A packing per plane) for pitched roofs
Cache the RoofModel per building id (geometry+tags hash) to avoid recomputation
Add confidence scoring for the roof model (tag-backed > geometry-only > default)
Flag non-rectangular, near-square, or very large roofs for manual ortho review
Add a 'verify on ortophoto' hint linking to DGT WMS ortho when confidence is low
Treat OSM roof tags strictly as overrides on top of geometry inference, not the primary source
Fix stale pvgis.ts comments that imply fixed south/30 and the 0.18 heuristic
Update DATA-SOURCES.md roof tag section (roof:direction downslope, levels*3.2, shape mapping)
Show roof type (flat/pitched + shape) in LocationDetails
Show inferred azimuth and tilt with their source (tag vs inferred) in LocationDetails
Show estimated building height + how it was derived (height tag / levels / default)
Add per-plane energy breakdown in LocationDetails for gabled roofs (plane A vs B kWh)
Add roof-shape icon/indicator (flat vs pitched) in TableView rows
Add roof-type filter (flat / pitched / unknown) to SearchFilter
Adjust leadScore size sub-score using plane-aware usable area, not raw footprint
Add a roof-quality sub-score (orientation/tilt suitability) to the lead score breakdown
Use azimuth suitability (south-facing bonus) to rank pitched roofs in leadScore
Include roof model + angles in the PDF report so proposals show real orientation
Create src/lib/roofGeometry.test.ts scaffold and Vitest wiring
Test: warehouse tag classifies as flat regardless of footprint shape
Test: gabled roof produces two planes with azimuths 180deg apart
Test: principal axis on a rotated rectangle returns the long-edge bearing
Test: height from 'height=12 m' parses to 12; from levels=3 parses to 9.6
Test: no-tag warehouse falls back to ~8m height default
Test: roof:angle tag overrides default tilt
Test: roof model azimuth invariant to lon/lat translation (ENU projection correctness)
Test: fetchPVGISMultiPlane sums two plane yields and merges 12-month arrays
Test: plane area split assigns peakPower proportionally
Add fixtures for flat, gabled, hipped and L-shaped roofs
Add JSDoc with units to all roofGeometry exports (degrees true-north, metres)
Guard against degenerate rings (collinear points) in principal-axis computation
Handle MultiPolygon roofs: build a RoofModel per polygon (wing) and aggregate
Detect skillion (mono-pitch) roofs and emit a single tilted plane in roof:direction
Detect hipped roofs and approximate as 2 dominant planes (ignore minor hips)
Clamp tilt to [0,60] and azimuth to [-180,180] before passing to PVGIS
Add an optimal-angles fallback: when roof model confidence is low, request PVGIS optimalangles
Show 'angles optimised by PVGIS' note when optimal path was used
Cache PVGIS multi-plane results per building to avoid duplicate network calls
Add abort handling for the multi-plane PVGIS calls (cancel on deselect)
Aggregate monthlyAverageKwh across planes for the SolarChart
Display per-plane azimuth arrows in LocationDetails preview (mini diagram)
Persist roof model fields in the DB schema (azimuth, tilt, shape, heightM)
Migrate existing leads: backfill roof model lazily on first open
Add a roof-confidence column to TableView for triage
Sort/filter by roof confidence so low-confidence roofs can be verified first
Expose renderHeight (from roof model) in buildingsToGeoJSON properties for Phase D
Compute renderHeight once at GeoJSON build time, never in a paint expression
Add a parseHeight util (height tag -> levels*3.2 -> use default) shared by overpass + roofGeometry
Test parseHeight priority order and unit stripping ('12 m', '3', missing)
Add a roof-shape legend entry/tooltip explaining flat vs pitched coloring
Document the flat-vs-pitched decision tree in ARCHITECTURE.md
Add an integration test: warehouse -> flat -> single PVGIS -> finance is stable
Add an integration test: gabled house -> two planes -> summed energy > single-plane south
Validate roof tags at the boundary (ignore garbage like roof:shape=yes)
Add tilt/azimuth manual override controls in LocationDetails advanced section
Recompute PVGIS + finance when user overrides tilt/azimuth
Show a south-facing suitability badge (good/ok/poor) from azimuth deviation
Use heightM to derive inter-row shading derate on flat tilted roofs (refine GCR)
Feed heightM into a self-shading note for very tall adjacent parapets
Expose roofShape + azimuth in GeoJSON properties for future color-by-orientation layer
Add a color-by-azimuth debug mode (gradient by aspect) toggle for QA
Add a unit test ensuring renderHeight is finite and >0 for all fixtures
Cache roof model + packing together so one recompute updates both
Add a 'multi-plane' indicator chip when a roof is split into >1 plane
Handle relations/multipolygons with holes when projecting to ENU (exclude inner rings)
Add explainable text: 'Flat warehouse, S, 12deg tilt, GCR 0.5' summary string
Wire roof model summary string into the PDF report header
Verify end-to-end: tags -> roof model -> per-plane pack -> per-plane PVGIS -> finance for flat and gabled samples

phases.goal: Make the map render flawlessly and stay correct under stress: deterministic layer ordering, collision-free feature ids, robust feature-state across setData and setStyle, flicker-free style switching, invalid-geometry guards, smooth performance at thousands of buildings, hover feedback, crisp outlines, and clean teardown.

improvements.title: Replace setStyle on basemap toggle with setStyle({transformStyle}) to preserve sources/layers and avoid flicker
Use transformStyle to carry over buildings, draw, panels sources across OSM<->satellite switches
Replace 31-bit hashId with a sequential integer id map (id<->buildingId) to eliminate collisions
Maintain a stable buildingId->numericId registry so feature-state survives across setData
On setData, removeFeatureState for ids no longer present, then re-apply selected/multiselected
Re-apply selected feature-state after every geojson setData effect
Re-apply all multiselected feature-states after setData using selectionIds
Define a fixed layer order array and add layers with beforeId to enforce z-order
Ensure draw-fill/draw-line render ABOVE buildings (currently can be hidden behind)
Place panels-fill/panels-outline below draw layers but above buildings-fill
Place selection-highlight outline as the topmost building layer for visibility
Tune buildings geojson source: set buffer and maxzoom to reduce tile churn
Color buildings purely via feature-state/get to avoid full setData on every lead edit
Push lead status as feature-state instead of rebuilding GeoJSON when only color changes
Add map.resize() when the map container transitions from display:none to visible (table<->map)
Add a ResizeObserver on the map container to call map.resize() on layout changes
Add mousemove hover: query buildings-fill, set hovered feature-state, pointer cursor
Add a hovered paint branch (subtle fill/outline emphasis) distinct from selected
Clear hovered feature-state on mouseleave to avoid stuck highlights
Wrap the draw-area turf calls (polygon/bbox/booleanPointInPolygon) in try/catch
Validate drawn polygon with turf.kinks before fetching (reject self-intersecting)
Simplify very large drawn polygons before point-in-polygon filtering
Enable antialias:true at Map construction for crisp outlines and extrusion edges
Cap devicePixelRatio (maxPixelRatio) to keep large-canvas perf reasonable on hi-DPI
Self-host or drop the demotiles glyphs URL; provide local font stack for labels
Null the mapInstance singleton on unmount (setMapInstance(null)) to prevent stale refs
Add an abort flag so async draw-area fetch results are ignored after unmount
Guard every getSource(...).setData call with existence + try/catch (style-change race)
Validate geometry in buildingsToGeoJSON: skip non Polygon/MultiPolygon types
Validate ring closure / minimum positions before emitting a feature
Log and count dropped invalid geometries; surface 'N skipped' to the user
Re-add DRAW_SOURCE in the styledata guard (currently only buildings is re-added)
Re-add panels source/layers in the styledata guard so satellite toggle keeps them
Clear selectedIdRef + selectBuilding(null) before setStyle to avoid orphaned selection
Re-apply selection after styledata if it should persist across basemap toggle
Defer queryRenderedFeatures in click handler to next frame to avoid stale results mid-animation
Add an Error Boundary around MapView with a recovery 'reload map' button
Add defensive CSS: map-container min-height/min-width to survive flex layout breakage
Validate feature.id is defined and source exists before any setFeatureState
Wrap multiselect setFeatureState in try/catch to tolerate removed features
Auto fitBounds to newly loaded buildings (draw-area or Get Rooftops) with padding
Use fitBounds(buildingBbox) instead of easeTo(centroid) when panning to selection
Add a subtle paint transition (fill-opacity) so selection change reads as responsive
Debounce rapid repeated map clicks to avoid double-query thrash
Memoize geojson build by content hash so identical data does not re-trigger setData
Confirm useFilteredBuildings/leads memo deps are complete; comment why they suffice
Split buildings paint into selected/multiselected/normal layers toggled by feature-state filter to cut per-feature expression cost
Add minzoom thresholds so outline width simplifies at low zoom for perf
Add a loading skeleton/spinner overlay until the first styledata event
Show a basemap-capability badge: 'Satélite' vs 'Só ruas (sem chave)'
Add explicit attribution text for OSM + MapTiler in an info affordance
Make the legend responsive: collapse/hide below 640px to avoid overlap
Normalize z-index usage (z-10/z-20/z-30) for overlays to prevent stacking conflicts
Show crosshair/cell cursor when Shift/Ctrl held to advertise multi-select
Add inline hint 'Shift+click = multi-seleção' near cursor during multi-select
Backspace removes the last drawn polygon point; show live point count
Toast on draw cancel (ESC) with the count of abandoned points
Report dropped relations with no outer members to the user (not silent)
Persist 3D/pitch/satellite view state in pye:mapview localStorage alongside center/zoom
Guard localStorage parsing of pye:mapview against new fields (backward compat)
Throttle moveend localStorage writes (already 500ms) and skip writes during animation
Add a maxBounds to keep prospecting within Portugal and avoid accidental world pans
Add NavigationControl with visualizePitch:true once 3D is introduced (Phase D dependency)
Add unit tests for the buildingId<->numericId registry (no collisions, stable mapping)
Add unit test: buildingsToGeoJSON skips Point/LineString geometries
Add unit test: buildingsToGeoJSON closes/validates rings
Add unit test: dropped-geometry counter increments for malformed input
Add a Playwright e2e: basemap toggle keeps buildings + selection (no flicker/drop)
Add a Playwright e2e: draw polygon -> buildings load -> fitBounds
Add a Playwright e2e: select building keeps highlight across table<->map switch
Profile render with 5000 features and record FPS baseline before/after layer-split
Add a feature-count guard that warns when rendering exceeds a perf threshold
Ensure remove of all event listeners (click/dblclick/move/mousemove) on unmount
Ensure ResizeObserver + keydown listeners are disconnected on unmount
Cancel in-flight MapTiler style fetch on unmount (AbortController)
Add a basemap selector (OSM / CartoDB / satellite) in BottomToolbar with persisted choice
Verify MapTiler attribution is included when satellite style is active
Add a 'reset view' control to recenter to default center/zoom
Ensure draw layers re-render above any newly added 3D/panels layers (order audit)
Add a sanity assertion in dev: all expected layers exist after styledata
Handle offline state during draw: detect navigator.onLine and show a clear message
Retry/backoff messaging when all Overpass mirrors fail during draw-area
Avoid rebuilding the entire source when toggling a single lead's flagged state
Batch multiple lead updates into a single setData/feature-state pass per frame
Add a paint expression unit/snapshot test for the buildings fill 'case' branches
Ensure outline line-width interpolates with zoom for crispness across scales
Add fade-in for newly loaded buildings to avoid abrupt popping
Prevent double-add of layers if styledata fires multiple times rapidly
Centralize source/layer ids as constants to avoid string drift
Extract addAppLayers into src/components/map/layers.ts to shrink MapView (<800 lines)
Extract draw helpers (updateDrawLayer/clearDraw) into src/components/map/draw.ts
Extract hover logic into a useMapHover hook for testability
Add a dev-only overlay showing current feature count + FPS for perf QA
Ensure feature-state for hover does not leak into selected styling priority
Add keyboard accessibility: Escape clears selection, not only draw mode
Guard pan-to-selected against missing building (already filtered) and finite coords
Add a test ensuring setStyle transformStyle preserves the buildings source
Document the rendering invariants (layer order, feature-state lifecycle) in ARCHITECTURE.md
Add CI script entries (lint + vitest + playwright) to package.json
Manual verification pass: switch basemap, draw, select, multi-select, resize, 5k features — no flicker/leaks

phases.goal: Add native MapLibre 3D: extrude building footprints by real renderHeight, a smooth 2D<->3D camera toggle (pitch/bearing), a sky/horizon, packed panels rendered as a thin 3D slab on the selected roof, and camera controls — all performant, no deck.gl, surviving setStyle.

improvements.title: Emit numeric renderHeight per feature in buildingsToGeoJSON (height -> levels*3.2 -> use default)
Implement parseHeight(tags, use) helper computed once at GeoJSON build time
Default warehouse/industrial flat-roof height to ~8m, retail ~6m when untagged
Keep fill-extrusion-base at 0 (ground-level buildings, not floating floors)
Add a buildings-3d fill-extrusion layer bound to the same buildings source
Copy selection color logic into fill-extrusion-color (cyan selected, amber multiselected, else fillColor)
Use fill-extrusion-height = get renderHeight via a zoom interpolation (0 at z15 -> full at z16)
Set buildings-3d minzoom:15 so extrusions only build geometry when zoomed in
Set fill-extrusion-vertical-gradient:true for natural shaded sides
Set fill-extrusion-opacity ~0.85 (per-layer; document it cannot vary per feature)
Start buildings-3d with layout.visibility 'none' (toggled on in 3D mode)
Add 'buildings-3d' to the click layers array so selection works on extrusions too
Add a 3D toggle button to BottomToolbar next to Layers/Fullscreen
enable3D(): setMaxPitch(70), show buildings-3d, hide buildings-fill, easeTo pitch 55 bearing -20
disable3D(): easeTo pitch 0 bearing 0, hide buildings-3d, show buildings-fill
Use easeTo (~700ms) for the 2D<->3D transition, never jumpTo
Keep bearing modest (-20deg) so rooftops stay readable
Set antialias:true at Map construction (cannot be enabled later) for clean extrusion edges
Set maxPitch:70 in Map constructor options
Persist 3D on/off + pitch + bearing in pye:mapview localStorage
Restore 3D mode + camera from localStorage on map init
Store is3DEnabled in a ref so the styledata handler can re-assert it
In styledata guard, after re-adding layers, re-apply 3D visibility (show 3d / hide fill)
Verify camera pitch survives setStyle (camera is style-independent) — no re-easeTo needed
Switch NavigationControl to visualizePitch:true so users can drag pitch/bearing
Enable right-drag / ctrl-drag rotate + pitch interactions (DragRotateHandler defaults)
Add a 'reset north / level' button to snap bearing 0 / pitch 0
Add map.setSky({}) for a cheap atmosphere/horizon at high pitch
Re-apply setSky after setStyle (sky is style-scoped) in the styledata guard
Tune sky colors to match the dark UI theme for visual cohesion
Skip terrain for the initial 3D feature (flat industrial estates gain little, cost tiles)
Document the no-key DEM options (demotiles, mapterhorn) for optional future terrain
Avoid AWS Terrarium terrain tiles (encoding + cost caveats) in any future terrain work
Generate packed-panel rectangles for the selected building (reuse Phase A packing)
Add roofHeight property to each panel feature = building renderHeight
Add a panels-3d fill-extrusion layer on a dedicated panels source
Set panels-3d base = get roofHeight, height = roofHeight + 0.15m (thin slab, avoids z-fight)
Color panels-3d dark blue (#1e3a8a), opacity 1.0
Compute + render panels-3d ONLY for the selected building (50-400 rects), never all
Clear panels source (setData empty) when selection changes or clears
Re-add panels source + panels-3d layer in the styledata guard
Show panels-3d only when 3D mode is on (sync visibility with the toggle)
Assume flat-roof panels lie horizontal at roof height (matches C&I warehouses)
Document tilted-rack 3D as out of scope (would need custom layers/three.js)
Gate panels-3d behind a high zoom (>=17) to limit extrusion load
Keep buildings-3d opacity high; drop vertical-gradient to false if FPS dips at scale
Document expected satellite-floats-above-imagery behavior (2D raster vs 3D box)
Avoid two extrusion layers with identical height ranges over the same polygons (z-fight)
Do NOT add deck.gl: native fill-extrusion covers extrusion + tilt + panel slab + selection
Record the deck.gl decision + revisit criteria (tilted-array, sun-path shadows) in docs
Add a height-source indicator on hover/tooltip (tag vs levels vs default)
Add a height legend/scale hint so extrusion heights are interpretable
Animate extrusion grow-in via the zoom interpolation rather than abrupt appearance
Ensure queryRenderedFeatures click includes both buildings-fill and buildings-3d
Keep selection feature-state shared between 2D and 3D building layers
Hover highlight should also work on buildings-3d (extend hover query layers)
Add a pitch slider (0-70) for fine 3D control beyond the on/off toggle
Clamp pitch slider to maxPitch and reset cleanly when leaving 3D
Add a bearing compass that reflects/sets current rotation
Persist last pitch slider value so it restores with the view
Add a keyboard shortcut to toggle 3D (and document in ShortcutsHelp)
Disable 3D toggle gracefully if WebGL extrusion is unsupported (feature-detect)
Guard renderHeight to a sane min (e.g. 2m) so degenerate heights still extrude visibly
Validate renderHeight is finite/positive in buildingsToGeoJSON (fallback to default)
Add unit test for parseHeight precedence and unit stripping
Add unit test: every fixture feature has finite renderHeight > 0
Add unit test: panel features carry roofHeight equal to building renderHeight
Add Playwright e2e: toggle 3D shows extrusions + sky, toggle off restores 2D
Add Playwright e2e: 3D mode survives satellite toggle (extrusions persist)
Add Playwright e2e: selecting a building in 3D draws the panel slab
Profile FPS with thousands of buildings in 3D at z16 and record baseline
If FPS dips, lower buildings-3d render scope (minzoom up / disable gradient)
Ensure 2D mode pays nothing: buildings-3d stays visibility none by default
Memoize panel-slab geojson so re-selecting the same building does not recompute
Avoid recomputing packing on every pitch change (decouple camera from data)
Add a subtle ambient color tweak so extruded sides read against satellite
Ensure draw polygon still renders correctly while in 3D (flat draw at ground)
Confirm draw layers sit above 3D buildings (order audit in 3D mode)
Extract 3D helpers (enable3D/disable3D/sky/panels) into src/components/map/threeD.ts
Add 3D state to the appStore so other UI can reflect it
Add a tooltip explaining what the panel slab represents (packed module footprint)
Color the panel slab by orientation/plane for gabled roofs (per-plane color)
Add a height-exaggeration toggle for tall-vs-flat differentiation (optional)
Ensure the 3D extrusion respects feature-state hover (subtle emphasis)
Guard easeTo calls when map is mid-animation to avoid jank (queue/cancel)
Recompute panel slab roofHeight when roof model height changes (Phase B link)
Add a 'fit to building in 3D' action that frames the selected roof at a good pitch
Make the 3D toggle reflect persisted state on next launch (button active styling)
Ensure sky is removed/added cleanly so 2D mode has no leftover atmosphere artifacts
Add a low-end fallback: cap maxPitch lower if GPU is weak (perf heuristic)
Document the full 3D feature (extrusion, toggle, sky, panel slab) in ARCHITECTURE.md
Add a screenshot/export that captures the 3D view (reuse fullscreen/canvas)
Verify panel slab z-offset eliminates flicker on the selected roof
Add a unit/snapshot test for the buildings-3d paint expression branches
Add a dev overlay showing current pitch/bearing/zoom for 3D QA
Ensure 3D layers are torn down with map.remove on unmount (no leaks)
Add ShortcutsHelp entries for 3D toggle, reset view, pitch controls
Confirm renderHeight reuse between buildings-3d and panel roofHeight is consistent
Add a fallback when renderHeight is missing (extrude to default, never 0)
Manual verification: extrude, tilt, rotate, select roof slab, satellite toggle, restore view — all stable

phases.theme: PHASE E — Map UX for Prospecting
phases.goal: Turn the map into a true prospecting cockpit: per-building kWp labels with decluttering, hover tooltip, panel-layout toggle, roof-orientation arrow, measurement tools, a layers panel, clustering at low zoom, a richer legend, and scale/minimap — so a prospector can read system size, orientation and viability at a glance without opening a panel.

improvements.title: Add estimatedKwp (packed or estimate) to feature properties in buildingsToGeoJSON for labels
Add a buildings-label symbol layer anchored at centroid showing rounded kWp
Use text-size zoom expression: hide labels below z15, scale up at z16+
Format label as e.g. '412 kWp' with a compact number formatter
Set text-ignore-placement:false + text-optional:true so overlapping labels declutter
Add text-halo for readability over satellite imagery
Re-add the label layer + glyphs in the styledata guard
Self-host glyphs (Phase C) so labels work without the demotiles CDN
Add an optional 'show kWp on all buildings' vs 'selected only' label mode
Always show the label for the selected building regardless of declutter
Build a hover tooltip component anchored near the cursor
Populate tooltip with name/operator, area m^2, kWp, roof type, score
Drive tooltip from the hover feature-state/mousemove query (Phase C hover)
Throttle tooltip updates (rAF) to avoid layout thrash on fast mouse moves
Hide tooltip on mouseleave and during draw mode
Add a panel-layout toggle button that draws packed panels for the selected building
Persist panel-layout-visible preference in localStorage
Show module count + kWp inline when panel layout is shown
Add a roof-orientation arrow symbol layer using stored azimuth/theta
Rotate the arrow icon by azimuth via icon-rotate from a feature property
Show the arrow only at high zoom / for the selected building to avoid clutter
Add an arrow legend entry explaining it points downslope / to azimuth
Add a measurement tool: click points to measure distance with live readout
Add area measurement: draw a temp polygon, show area + perimeter live
Use turf.length / turf.area for measurement and format in m / m^2 / ha
Add a dedicated measure source/layer (dashed line + vertices) separate from draw
Clear measurement on ESC and on tool toggle off
Build a Layers panel component listing toggleable overlays
Layers panel toggles: kWp labels, panel layout, orientation arrows, 3D, clusters
Layers panel basemap selector (OSM / CartoDB / satellite) with persistence
Wire the existing Layers toolbar button to open the Layers panel
Persist all layer toggles in localStorage and restore on load
Make the Layers panel responsive/collapsible on small viewports
Add a clustered geojson source variant for low zoom (cluster:true)
Render cluster circles sized/colored by point_count below z13
Add a cluster-count symbol layer (number inside the circle)
Expand cluster on click (getClusterExpansionZoom + easeTo)
Render individual building polygons only at z13+ (switch from clusters)
Decide clustering vs polygons cleanly (clusters need a point source; keep both sources in sync)
Build a centroid point FeatureCollection for clustering from buildings
Aggregate total kWp per cluster (clusterProperties sum of estimatedKwp)
Show aggregated cluster kWp in the cluster label (e.g. '12 · 4.1 MWp')
Color clusters by average lead score / status mix for triage
Re-add cluster source/layers in the styledata guard
Expand the legend to a richer, collapsible panel (status + overlays)
Add legend entries for kWp label, panel layout, orientation arrow, clusters
Make the legend responsive: collapse below 640px (Phase C alignment)
Add a ScaleControl (metric) to the map
Add a minimap/overview inset showing current viewport in regional context
Sync the minimap viewport rectangle with the main map move events
Allow click on minimap to recenter the main map
Add a color-by mode selector: status / score / kWp / roof type
Implement color-by-kWp gradient paint expression (low->high)
Implement color-by-score gradient (cold grey -> hot green)
Update the legend dynamically to match the active color-by mode
Add a kWp range slider filter directly on the map (quick triage)
Show count of buildings matching the on-map kWp filter
Add a quick 'top N by kWp' highlight overlay
Add a 'fit to filtered buildings' button (fitBounds of visible set)
Add a per-building popup (click) showing kWp, energy, payback, score, contact
Popup CTA buttons: open details, mark contacted, flag
Ensure popup repositions on map move and closes on deselect
Add a hover label preview of kWp even when global labels are off
Add a measurement results readout box (distance/area) pinned to a corner
Snap measurement vertices to building corners when near (turf nearestPoint)
Add keyboard shortcuts for measure tool + layers panel (ShortcutsHelp)
Show roof-orientation arrows for all visible buildings at very high zoom (optional toggle)
Add a 'south-facing roofs' quick filter that dims poorly-oriented roofs
Add total visible kWp + count summary chip on the map
Add total visible estimated annual savings chip (sum from finance)
Add a 'panel layout for all visible' batch preview at high zoom (perf-guarded)
Guard batch panel preview by zoom + max feature count to protect FPS
Add an info modal crediting OSM + MapTiler + PVGIS data sources
Add a loading skeleton/grid until first styledata (Phase C alignment)
Add a basemap-capability badge ('Satélite' vs 'Só ruas')
Add a 'reset all overlays' button in the Layers panel
Add a compact mode for the map toolbar on small screens
Add a tooltip explaining the score color in the legend
Add a 'measure to building' helper showing distance from cursor to nearest roof
Show kWp labels with adaptive precision (kWp under 1000, MWp above)
Add an export-current-view button (PNG) for sharing prospecting maps
Persist color-by mode and labels mode in localStorage
Add a clusters-on toggle with sensible default off above z13
Add hover highlight on clusters with pointer cursor
Ensure tooltip + popup do not both show simultaneously (mutual exclusion)
Add a unit test for the kWp label formatter (kWp/MWp thresholds)
Extract number/kWp/area formatters into src/lib/format.ts (reuse across map + table)
Add a Playwright e2e: hover building shows tooltip with kWp
Add a Playwright e2e: toggle panel layout draws panels for selection
Add a Playwright e2e: clusters appear at low zoom and expand on click
Add a Playwright e2e: measurement tool reports plausible distance
Add a Playwright e2e: kWp labels declutter (no overlap) at z14
Ensure all new overlays re-add after setStyle (styledata audit for labels/arrows/clusters/measure)
Ensure all new sources/layers torn down on unmount (no leaks)
Document the prospecting cockpit UX (overlays, toggles, shortcuts) in docs
Add ShortcutsHelp entries for all new map tools (measure, layers, labels, orientation)
Accessibility pass: ARIA labels + keyboard focus for map toolbar/panel buttons
Mobile pass: ensure tooltip/popup/legend/panel do not overlap on <640px
Performance pass: clustering + labels + arrows at thousands of buildings stays smooth
Manual verification: label, hover, panel toggle, arrow, measure, layers panel, clusters, legend, scale, minimap all work together
